line_2: Surveyed the assembled chiefs, and thus began:

line_1: Our spears, our life-blood, for Caupolican!
line_2: At once the loud acclaim tumultuous ran:

line_1: When thus, with lifted axe, Caupolican:
line_2: The sounds of sadness through the circle ran,

line_1: Then cried — Chiefs, friends, and thou, Caupolican,
line_2: Oh, spare this innocent and holy man!
